race.description: Country Music Raceday On Sale Now Hcp (Bm65)
race.comment: Former NSW galloper ARTFUL PERSUASION (2) wasn't too far away when having the first run for the new stable and will have taken a lot of benefit from that first-up hit-out. Sure to find this easier than what he faced down south and should be right there at the business end. NAILS AND PRIDE (1) has won two of his past three and is racing high on confidence of late. Gets some well-needed weight relief with the claim and can continue the rich vein of form. HOLY FLASH (4) has placed two of three over this course and distance and maps ideally for this contest from gate two. Is a three-time winner over this distance range and is sure to make his presence felt. GRAND CRUSADER (3) gets 3kg off and draws favourably in gate three. In the mix for some minor money. FORT WILLIAM (7) best of the rest.
